notableMoments: First World Cup qualification in 1982 came amid the backdrop of the 'Football War' with El Salvador in 1969
Drew 1-1 with Spain and 1-1 with Northern Ireland in their 1982 debut, narrowly missing the second round
28-year wait between their first (1982) and second (2010) World Cup appearances
Carlo Costly scored their first World Cup goal in 28 years at the 2010 tournament in South Africa
Qualified for back-to-back World Cups for the first time in 2010 and 2014
The 'Football War' between Honduras and El Salvador in 1969 was partly triggered by World Cup qualifying tensions
